creator: daeron@optushome.com.au
text: I'd say an essential option having finally discovered that all the lost data and updates that spasmodically disappear from NTFS drives appears to have been gvfsd-trash preventing the system writing to the drive for days or weeks. I can live with it stealing memory for a while but when a UPS fails and you loose everything you'd been doing since gvfsd-trash began running, its a tad mind blowing.
